title: Super-early Bday Present
content:
My first Bday present is here ...

!/gallery/misc/ipod_photo.jpg!

It's a color iPod with 60GB of storage space. %(me)With all my music and podcasts, I think I still have plenty of space to build a house. --"%

Thank you friend, for remembering the Bday. The iPod is nice but I don't really need it. *I actually want the Mighty Mouse* when I said "anything from Apple Store would do". ;) %(me)The person asked me a while ago "what do you want for your Bday?"%

%(me)My Bday is not anytime soon though. The friend gave this to me today because the person wanted to surprise me. Okay, I'm surprised. Hehehe ...%
